>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/flow-runs/cancel"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Cancel multiple paused/queued flow runs

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"projectId":{"type":"string","pattern":"^[0-9a-zA-Z]{21}$"},"flowRunIds":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","pattern":"^[0-9a-zA-Z]{21}$"}},"excludeFlowRunIds":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","pattern":"^[0-9a-zA-Z]{21}$"}},"status":{"type":"array","items":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string","enum":["PAUSED"]},{"type":"string","enum":["QUEUED"]}]}},"flowId":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","pattern":"^[0-9a-zA-Z]{21}$"}},"createdAfter":{"type":"string"},"createdBefore":{"type":"string"}},"required":["projectId"]}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Default Response"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
